name: shipwithai
description: ShipWithAI SDLC Toolkit — Claude Code plugins covering the full software development lifecycle.

plugins.name: shipwithai-auth
plugins.description: Set up production-ready auth in minutes. Supports Better Auth and Firebase Auth with OAuth social login, UI components, database schemas. Auto-detects existing themes.

plugins.name: shipwithai-harness
plugins.description: Generate a production-ready Claude Code harness for your project. Auto-detects stack (Next.js, Laravel, Spring Boot). Generates CLAUDE.md, settings.json, and safety hooks in one command.
